query: Our prototype has a button that spawns an enemy. Pressing it feels boring and unresponsive.
expected_behavior: Applies the Trinity of Feedback to the button: Visual, Audio, and Haptic
Specifies the Visual feedback: squash on press, particle burst on release, enemy entrance animation
Specifies the Audio feedback: a specific sound event tied to the button press
Specifies the Haptic feedback: a light impact tap on press
Does not recommend a UI redesign — stays surgical on adding juice to the existing button
